title: Deploy (Nested Steps)
expectation: Use a dedicated manager integration worktree as the only mutable surface for this process; never edit the shared repository checkout during integration, release, deploy, or live validation. If a worker-hosted feature branch is the source of truth, first confirm that a focused feature branch exists, then run the repository-profile-aware worker-feature merge flow to refresh that branch from latest base and either integrate it through the manager worktree or push the feature branch and open the staging PR before continuing. After that integration step, follow the repository profile promotion and deploy path: runtime repos promote onto `main`, tag, and deploy through the canonical runtime path, while PR-to-staging repos merge the reviewed PR into `staging` and validate the staged environment. Complete cleanup or rollback recovery as required.
idlePrompt: If deployment is complete, reply only with 'done: deploy complete'. If you are truly blocked on a missing focused feature branch, user decision, or environment dependency, reply only with 'blocked: deploy blocked'. Otherwise resume the deploy process immediately and perform the next required integration, release, deploy, cleanup, or validation step instead of giving only a status update.
stopConditions: blocked on focused feature branch, user decision, or environment dependency
